web.markdown:
![](https://casacipriani.miami/assets/images/image01.png?v=0be4eb8f)

Coming soon

[⬆︎](https://casacipriani.miami/#gototop)

[![#home](https://casacipriani.miami/assets/images/image13.png?v=0be4eb8f)](https://casacipriani.miami/#home)

## Casa Cipriani is a timeless, stylish and service oriented luxury condominium and hotel coming soon to Miami

23 Residences / 17 Stories.One to Four Bedroom Configurations.Developed by Cipriani, 13th Floor Investments & Midtown Equities. Designed by Brandon Haw Architecture

**[Residences](https://casacipriani.miami/#residences)**

**[Amenities](https://casacipriani.miami/#amenities)**

**[Location](https://casacipriani.miami/#location)**

**[About Cipriani](https://casacipriani.miami/#cipriani)**

**[The team](https://casacipriani.miami/#team)**

**[Contact Us](https://casacipriani.miami/#contact)**

![](https://casacipriani.miami/assets/images/image19.jpg?v=0be4eb8f)

![](https://casacipriani.miami/assets/images/image09.jpg?v=0be4eb8f)

### One to Four Bedroom Configurations

## The Residences

All Luxury condos in Casa Cipriani include generous living areas with ceiling heights of 10 feet, floor-to-ceiling sliding glass doors and windows with magnificent panoramic views, terrace access from the living room and primary bedroom of every residence, gracious walk-in wardrobes in every primary bedroom, an exquisite selection of flooring options included, direct elevator entry for select residences, eat-in, open kitchen with custom Italian cabinetry inspired by Cipriani’s renowned style, top-of-the-line appliances from Wolf Sub-Zero, including cooktop, integrated refrigerator, freezer, wine cooler, and dishwasher, primary bathrooms with grand, stand-alone bathtubs and glass-enclosed showers; vanities with premium Italian cabinetry, imported stone tops, back-lit mirrors; separate room with water closet, spacious laundry rooms with full-size washing machine and dryer, with a utility sink in most residences, central air conditioning and heating systems, innovative smart technology infrastructure

and more!

SPECTACULAR COMMON AREAS

LUXURY AMENITIES

Casa Cipriani features resort-style amenities, including a private members' club, private entrance for residents, Signature private dining experiences by Cipriani, In-home dining and 24-hour catering services, swimming pool with poolside food and beverage services, holistic spa with sauna and treatment rooms, luxurious residents’ lounge for special events, state-of-the-art fitness center, screening room, library, and children's playroom, high-speed internet access across all public areas, electric vehicle charging stations, air-conditioned storage rooms, covered garage with 24-hour complimentary valet parking, and more.

![](https://casacipriani.miami/assets/images/image17.jpg?v=0be4eb8f)

### SOUTH OF BRICKELL

## THE LOCATION

Building Address:

[3611 Collins Ave, Miami Beach, FL 33140](https://maps.app.goo.gl/nfsAJZnX2Y3XKmRb8)

\- Brickell City Centre: 20 minutes’ drive\- Downtown: 18 minutes’ drive\- Wynwood: 18 minutes’ drive\- Bal Harbor Shops: 10 minutes’ drive\- Miami Airport: 30 minutes’ drive\- Key Biscayne: 30 minutes’ drive

## ABOUT CIPRIANI

The Cipriani Residences are renowned for setting the gold standard in service excellence, a tradition refined and perfected through four generations of dedication and expertise. This extraordinary legacy traces its origins back to the iconic Harry's Bar in Venice, established in 1931. Nestled in a cozy and inviting space, Harry's Bar quickly became a cultural haven, drawing an eclectic mix of artists, aristocrats, and literary figures. It was a favorite retreat for luminaries such as Ernest Hemingway and Katharine Hepburn, whose patronage further cemented its legendary status.Harry's Bar not only offered an atmosphere of warmth and sophistication but also revolutionized the culinary world. Its founder, Giuseppe Cipriani, is celebrated for creating the now-iconic Carpaccio and the Bellini cocktail, both of which have become enduring symbols of the Cipriani dining experience. These innovations, steeped in elegance and simplicity, continue to delight connoisseurs across the globe.Over the decades, the Cipriani brand has flourished, establishing its presence in some of the world's most glamorous cities. From the sophisticated dining establishments in Monte Carlo and Mexico City to the exclusive Casa Cipriani in New York City, each location embodies the hallmark of impeccable service and timeless style. Soon, the Cipriani legacy will extend to South Beach, where Casa Cipriani is poised to offer its signature blend of bespoke hospitality and vibrant elegance, ensuring an unforgettable experience in this dynamic locale.

![](https://casacipriani.miami/assets/images/image05.jpg?v=0be4eb8f)

[Prices](https://casacipriani.miami/#prices) \| [Location](https://casacipriani.miami/#location) \| [Contact Us](https://casacipriani.miami/#contact)

## THE DEVELOPERS

## Cipriani, 13th Floor Investments & Midtown Equities

# The warm, inviting charm of Venetian elegance graces Cipriani properties around the globe. Cipriani Residences Miami upholds this legacy of gracious hospitality, showcasing effortlessly sophisticated design, meticulous attention to detail, and unique, high-end experiences. 13th Floor has successfully developed 5.7 million square feet of space and more than 3,900 homes across various residential categories. Midtown Equities, a New York City-based real estate developer, boasts a distinguished collection of over 100 properties.

![](https://casacipriani.miami/assets/images/image14.jpg?v=0be4eb8f)

This is a great investment opportunity!

![Miami Residential Group](https://miamiresidential.com/miamirealestate//TopProducersMRG.jpg)

### PREsented by miami residential group

## About the Building

Casa Cipriani Miami is the newest expression of refined oceanfront living in Miami Beach. Located at 3611 Collins Avenue, this exclusive 17-story development introduces a limited collection of 23 ultra-luxury residences, a 40-suite boutique hotel, and a private members’ club—bringing the internationally acclaimed Cipriani lifestyle to the shores of South Florida.

Thoughtfully designed by architect Brandon Haw, the building blends contemporary elegance with subtle Art Deco influences, creating a boutique-scale presence that complements its iconic Collins Avenue setting. Each luxury residence has been crafted to offer panoramic views, impeccable finishes, and a seamless connection to the beachside surroundings.

Residents and club members will enjoy a curated suite of five-star amenities, including a Cipriani signature restaurant, a members-only club lounge, full-service spa, fitness center, pool deck, and direct beach access. In-home dining, personalized service, and exclusive wellness offerings enhance the everyday experience—elevating it into something extraordinary.

Developed by 13th Floor Investments, Midtown Equities, and the Cipriani family, Casa Cipriani Miami offers a rare opportunity to own a branded residence in one of Miami Beach’s most desirable oceanfront locations. For those seeking the privacy of a residence with the vibrancy of a private club, this is a lifestyle unlike any other.

- [Schedule a Tourfancyicon\_arrowone\_right](https://www.themeridianadvisors.com/schedule-a-condo-tour?varchar_col1=Casa%20Cipriani%20Miami)

- Secure valet and garage parking
